review_text_liked: Great location for waterfalls in the North. The staff on property was very helpful and gave me the contact of a bike driver who rode me around to the waterfalls per my chosen itinerary. The restaurant on the property was really nice and had good food. The breakfast was amazing. Room was cozy too, they have hot water for shower.
review_text_disliked: Don’t recommend paying extra for the mountain view room since you can only see a small hill. Felt a few tremors and learnt that it’s normal in Bedugal. It was super rainy in the north and rained every single day of my stay. Also gets quite chilly so carry a jacket and warm clothes. The tub in the washroom didn’t fill as the stopper kept letting water out so it was useless having a tub. The washroom wasn’t very clean when I checked in.

review_text_liked: Quirky place on a hill road. Was very quiet, for a time we were the only people at the hotel! It has a quiet charm and the staff are lovely, always willingto help.The bungalows are cool design. Courtesy shuttle into the town area available. Food at rest was simple but very tasty including some local dishes, we ate there every night
review_text_disliked: The whole area was very devoid of western tourist including our hotel (which was nice), however seemed like area had taken a bit of a downturn and as a result a little bit tired, don't expect hustling business. Sometimes hard to find staff, felt like we were staying at a locals house rather than a medium size hotel! Once again we were ok with this, but others might not like it

review_title: A great place to enjoy nature at a unique hotel with lovely gardens and staff.
review_text_liked: The staff were friendly and helpful. There was a shuttle bus that could be used to go to the main part of town. Breakfasts and evening meals were from a varied menu - Balinese and Western. There was a pool table and darts board in the restaurant, which was a pleasant surprise. The whole atmosphere was colonial as the rooms were all wooden - even some lampshades in the bathroom. The gardens around the cottages were magnificent. The bed was very comfortable. The best part of our stay was going to the botanical gardens - about 150 acres of wonderful flowers, shrubs and mini forests. We went there for 2 days. A ticket will be valid for more than one week day - a bargain! There is another showcase garden next to the lake. Take the shuttle bus to the botanical gardens then walk back - mainly downhill. On the way there, or on the way back, allow time for the Bird Park.
review_text_disliked: The restaurant area could have been better dusted and swept. The main complaint is the location next to the busy road. As it was on a hill, the truck noise was considerable at times. I consider myself a light sleeper, but in the end I did get a good sleep, so first impressions were wrong.

review_text_liked: The room was cute and the bathroom beautiful. The general hotel area is really pretty.
review_text_disliked: You'll have to walk a bit on a road with a lot of traffic to get anywhere. Make sure to bring lamps so you're visible in the dark. The breakfast follows the same pattern as the sister hotel "Poppies" is Kuta but is not remotely as good. It's still ok though. Our hot water tank ran out so we didn't have any warm water at all for the last 1,5 days of our stay. We didn't complain about it though. They might have been able to fix it. One person also offered his son as a driver, but the son wanted 350K to drive us to the next place. After asking around a little we found another driver who did the same route for 200K.

review_text_liked: All staff and shuttle bus driver were great. Rooms are cute, comfortable and clean cottages, bathroom even has a bath. Lovely view looking out to mountains from balcony.. Breakfast is cooked fresh to order and fresh juice and fruit. Restaurant and bar was not attended in the afternoon as we sat down for a beer and no-one came to serve us but as we decided to leave, we saw a bell on a counter as you walk in but it was partially hidden by some cards so we didn't see it. Maybe a sign should be left there advising people to ring the bell if unattended. We went back later after dark to play some pool and there were 2 staff there were great. We asked for some music while we played pool but they didn't have any but were happy for us to play on our phone. Shuttle driver dropped us to the lake for lunch and picked us up a bit later then dropped us to the Handara golf club as our husbands played a game then he picked us all up again later. Great service as its not safe to walk on the roads, with so much traffic due to Independence Day holiday.

review_title: Good stop gap for the night 🌉
review_text_liked: Very cute little bungalows set in a beautiful garden which is very well kept. The site is sandwiched between two roads so a bit noisy at times but it's easy to forget looking at the garden. The bungalow itself was clean, had a nice bathroom and although fairly small, had everything that was needed including plenty of storage. I thought they looked better in real life than the pictures. We were there for 1 night with 4 year old and baby to break up journey and see the temple and there was plenty of room. They turned the alcove into a bed and could easily have fit another in there if you had more children (alcove has two single beds end to end). They really should advertise this in their rooms as we nearly didn't go as we didn't think there was room for us all in one bungalow! The staff at this place are so lovely and great with the kids! The only downside was that dinner was not that flavoursome (we ordered soups) but the breakfast that was included was good. The temple nearby is also good for kids - it has a play park which my daughter loved! We went about 4pm, it was quiet and cool temperature which was perfect!

review_title: Impeccable Value-for-money stay in Bedugul - Highly recommended !
review_text_liked: The room was beautiful for the price - Excellent Value for money - We travelled as a family with 2 small kids (1 and 3 year old) and given the nature of the place and the limited offerings in Bedugul, we couldnt have asked for more. About the place : If you like to visit Ulun Danu Beratan temple, or the Handara gate, it is always advised to come early in the morning, and this place is almost 2 hours from Ubud, so staying here gives an undue advantage of being able to visit these places early in the morning before the crowd picks up, and unlike the rest of Bali, this place is colder and does not require aircon even in the summers. About the property/room : Stunning for the price we paid ! We stayed at Meraki, the villa in the middle, as the ones in either sides are closer to the road and may attract a lot of vehicle noise - the room was elegant, very balinese in nature with lot of wood work, the bathroom was beautiful with a nice tub and a shower, and it had stone flooring. The hotel provides free shuttle (based on availability) to Bedugul centre (where you can find a few restaurants and supermarkets), Ulun Danu Beratan temple and Bloom gardens, which was a big plus, considering that this place does not have grab as for other rural places in Bali. We were pampered by being served breakfast in the room, the breakfast was really good for the money we paid. Service - Impeccable, I would say ! Special Thanks to Ariadi for accommodating our requests and taking care of us so well, and for arranging the best driver - Dewa we had for local sightseeing and travel back to Ubud (Highly recommended). Overall, we loved the stay and recommend this to anyone intending to stay in Bedugul or Handara at a budget friendly price.
review_text_disliked: Nothing really, the place has limited restaurant options but that has nothing to do with the hotel really. In fact, this place has the most convenient location for stay in bedugul if you are not too concerned about the traffic sounds. Water kettle in the room would have been nice to have.

review_title: Clean and spacious rooms with comfortable bed and small veranda looking onto beautiful gardens.
review_text_liked: The room was well laid out with a large comfortable king-sized bed and an extra single bed in an alcove. The bathroom was decent and nice to have a bath with kids although it was a bit slow to run. The shower was great though and a good size. The room also had a spacious balcony with a view of the beautifully kept gardens and the hills beyond. The staff were friendly and helpful.
review_text_disliked: The room was clean but smelt a bit musty when we arrived and we needed to let the air through a bit. Something natural to make the room smell better would make a difference, given the flowers growing outside the door smelt incredible. The bathroom shampoo and conditioner could also do with updating and that makes a big difference. The location is very close to Bedugul making an ideal base but it is quite close to the road which means a little bit of road noise occasionally, with especially annoying motorbikes with loud exhausts.

You can choose to have breakfast in your room or in the restaurant, it was quite good. The personnel was very helpful, specially since Grab was not working on a Sunday (beware of it) and they arranged is a driver for the day who was really kind and informative. We fell in love with the hotel.

review_title: A Memorable stay with friendly hosts!
review_text_liked: The friendly host is called Gara, she recommends interesting places to visit in Bedugul, temples on the lake, botanical gardens, markets, waterfalls and many more places with beautiful views that must be visited! Because he is organized a private car, we went around visiting great places in the mountainous areas of Bali, starting from botanical gardens, temples on lakes, and also beautiful waterfalls! we also saw lots of tropical garden plants there! we were only here one night, we were very lucky to find a good host, so one day was enough to visit beautiful places in Bedugul area. we highly recommend Gara as a host you should meet when staying there! thanks for that Gara!
review_text_disliked: few choices of western food, we got burgers that were still cold, service needs to be improved, the restaurant looks old and less attractive. the problem in the room is noise, humidity, bathroom cleanliness, and facilities need to be added such as toothbrush slippers etc. like other hotels at the same price! But it's ok

review_title: Stawberry Hill was a fantastic stay!
review_text_liked: Saya tidak bisa ucap cukup baik tentang @strawberry_hill_bali di Bedugul. Setiap bungalow dinamai menutut gunung di indonesia. Kami bisa lihat Gunung Pohen dari jendela kamar kami. Resturan luar biasa enak dgn opsi comfort food indonesia dan opsi makan barat. Strawberry hill dilokasi sangat dekat Kebun Raya Bali, Ulun Danu Bratan, tidak jauh dari Munduk dan pantai utara Bali. Dan mereka tawar shuttle bus to tempat di Bedugul. Pandangan dari facilitas luar biasa dgn gunungan berselimuti awan² /kabut. Tanah keliling facilitas taman-taman yang terawat dengan sangat baik dgn daun/bunga menakjubkan. Terutama lebih penting... staffnya luar biasa membantukan, baik hati dan menjadikan semua nyaman dan aysik. Terimakasih Suksema! 🙏🏼❤️🙏🏼 I can't say enough good things about @strawberry_hill_bali in Bedugul. Each bungalow is named after a mountain in Indonesia. We could see Mount Pohen from our room window. Amazingly delicious restaurant with Indonesian comfort food options and western dining options. Strawberry Hill is located very near the Bali Botanical Gardens, Ulun Danu Bratan, not far from Munduk and the north coast of Bali. And they offered a shuttle bus to a place in Bedugul. The views from the facilities are extraordinary with mountains covered in clouds/mist. The surrounding grounds feature very well maintained gardens with stunning leaves/flowers. Especially more important... the staff is incredibly helpful, kind and makes everything comfortable and fun. Thank you Suksema!

review_title: für ein bis zwei Tage ok
review_text_liked: Nettes, hilfreiches Personal, ansich eine schön angelegte Anlage, leider etwas in die Jahre gekommen, Frühstück auf der eigenen Veranda. Gute Lage um alle Sehenswürdigkeit der Region schnell zu erreichen. Vermittlung eines Mietrollers.
review_text_disliked: Lage grenzwertig in der Kurve der grössten Hauptstrasse der Nord-Süd Verbindung durch Bali, sehr lauter Verkehrslärm (aufhalten will man sich dort nicht länger, aber guter Ausgangsort für Ausflüge in den Berge ). Etwas abgewohnt, in die Jahre gekommen, kein Kühlschrank. Tassen für Kaffee nicht ganz sauber, Shampoofläschchen im Bad alle halb leer. Essen im Restaurant teuer und mässig lecker, allerdings merkwürdige Atmosphäre dort, kaum Gäste, alt und nicht perfekt sauber, Frühstück war ok. Teure Getränke.
full_review: title: für ein bis zwei Tage ok. liked: Nettes, hilfreiches Personal, ansich eine schön angelegte Anlage, leider etwas in die Jahre gekommen, Frühstück auf der eigenen Veranda. Gute Lage um alle Sehenswürdigkeit der Region schnell zu erreichen. Vermittlung eines Mietrollers. disliked: Lage grenzwertig in der Kurve der grössten Hauptstrasse der Nord-Süd Verbindung durch Bali, sehr lauter Verkehrslärm (aufhalten will man sich dort nicht länger, aber guter Ausgangsort für Ausflüge in den Berge ). Etwas abgewohnt, in die Jahre gekommen, kein Kühlschrank. Tassen für Kaffee nicht ganz sauber, Shampoofläschchen im Bad alle halb leer. Essen im Restaurant teuer und mässig lecker, allerdings merkwürdige Atmosphäre dort, kaum Gäste, alt und nicht perfekt sauber, Frühstück war ok. Teure Getränke.

Wir haben sogar das Frühstück auf den eigenen Balkon bekommen. Schöner Garten. Die Fahrer bieten auch Fahrten zu Attraktionen an, die weiter entfernt sind. Es gibt ein Hotel Restaurant, dieses hat den ganzen Tag geöffnet.
review_text_disliked: Das Hotel ist sehr außerhalb. Der kostenlose Shuttle fährt einen nur bis 18 Uhr. Die Fahrer sind aber sehr nett und helfen einen oft auch noch nach 18 Uhr, denn andere Fahrdienste gibt es in der Gegend nicht viele. Zu Fuß kann man nicht gut zu Restaurants gehen.

review_title: Struttura fantastica e molto piacevole, da passarci più di una notte!
review_text_liked: Struttura perfetta sotto molti punti di vista: bungalow spaziosi e molto comodi, tutto pulito, rimodernato e tenuto molto bene, bagni bellissimi; letti molto comodi; giardino ben curato, l'intera struttura è ben curata; istorante buono e non costoso. Un vero peccato averci passato solo una notte, meriterebbe soggiorni più lunghi, un vero piacere!
review_text_disliked: Un po' defilato, non vicinissimo al lago (20 min. a piedi). Forse l'unica piccola pecca dell'intera struttura è la strada che passa sotto e sopra, molto trafficata anche di notte da auto e moto, il cui rumore purtroppo si sente anche nelle stanze. Tuttavia questo piccolo problema non offusca questo autentico gioiellino.

review_text_liked: Un séjour parfait du début à la fin ! Nous avons passé un moment exceptionnel dans cet hôtel. Dès notre arrivée, l’accueil a été chaleureux et professionnel. La chambre était pleine de charme dans un style très Balinais, impeccablement propre et très confortable, avec une vue magnifique. Le personnel a toujours été disponible, souriant et aux petits soins. Le petit-déjeuner était copieux et de grande qualité, avec des produits frais et variés. L’emplacement est idéal, proche des principaux points d’intérêt tout en étant calme. Un grand bravo à toute l’équipe pour leur sens du service irréprochable. Nous reviendrons sans hésiter et recommandons cet établissement les yeux fermés !

review_title: Hotel de carretera correcto pero no excelente
review_text_liked: El hotel y la habitación estaban decoradas de forma bonita. El baño estaba equipado muy bien, con bañera incluida. El personal fue muy atento y nos ayudó mucho en diversas ocasiones. El precio era económico.
review_text_disliked: La habitación tiene mucha humedad. Aunque hay deshumidificador, se nota mucho en el olor. La ubicación, en mitad de la carretera hace necesario contratar conductores (no funcionan aplicaciones como Gojeck o Grab) o depender del Shuttle del hotel (solo para moverte por el pueblo de Bedugul y hasta las 18h) El restaurante, aunque económico, no destaca especialmente. La limpieza podría mejorar. Encontré algunas manchas en las sábanas. Además encontramos algunos bichos en la habitación (cucaracha y ratón), pero es normal estando rodeado de tanta naturaleza.

review_text_disliked: Funcionários tínhamos sempre que andar a chamá-los sempre que quisemos comer. Houve um dia que não estávamos presentes no quarto e, deixaram o pequeno almoço na varanda, quando chegamos havia ratos a comer o pequeno almoço. review_text_liked: Samotný resort je pěkný. Mají chytře vymyšlené, že v chatičkách jsou vysoušeče, což se vzhledem k proměnlivému počasí zde v horách hodí. Dá se odtud vyrážet velmi dobře na několik úžasných vodopádů na severních svazích, ke klášteru, botanické zahradě a jezerům. Je to odtud přes kopec, byť to z Google maps není na první pohled zřejmé. Chcete-li ubytování využít a vidět tyto atrakce, je vhodné mít skůtr nebo auto.
review_text_disliked: Umístění je takové, že resort obklopuje ze 3 stran serpentina s poměrně velkým provozem. Snaží se to odhlučnit vysokými zdmi, ale úplného klidu nedosáhli.
